summary: Autonomous dedupe classification only. #62195 remains the non-security canonical PR for the narrow cron/heartbeat preHook gate work. #45465 is security-sensitive and must route to central security triage. #45129 is already closed and should not receive a closure action. #9465 is related broader product work and should stay open outside this dedupe closeout.

actions.reason: Best live non-security canonical path for the narrow preHook gate family; keep open for maintainer review and proof.
Open security-sensitive PR must be handled by central OpenClaw security triage; this does not block non-security classification of #62195.
Already closed as superseded by #62195; no further action is allowed or needed.
Related cron hook product work with distinct scope; keep open and do not close as a duplicate of the narrow #62195 preHook PR.
